title: Momonosuke Becomes Shogun
description: On pages 5–7, this part focuses on Unknown person #4, Wano Citizens, Yamato, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Momonosuke as Wano celebrates liberation while Momonosuke becomes shogun, Green Bull threatens the island, and the alliance prepares to depart.
scene: Wano celebrates liberation while Momonosuke becomes shogun, Green Bull threatens the island, and the alliance prepares to depart.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Look!! Grilled Squid and candy apples!!

dialogue.speaker: Wano Citizens
dialogue.text: This is my first festival!! It's amazing!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: YEAH!! Listen up, this next number...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: How do you know my name...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: You're looking at my personal collection.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The person should be interested in the future of the United States, and the

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They're my majestic KokesHi Dolls. Cute, aren't they?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Why would your collection be down here?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This was originally something of a secret hobby room for me, however...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I ended up imprisoned down here for a number of years..

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The best option is to create the most important and effective and effective and effective and effective and effective and effective and effective and effective and effective information of the industry.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I thought you were a swordsmith... who exactly are you?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I took to switching because I had talent for it, but it was always just a hobby.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: governing is such weary work after all...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He does not, and I do not intend to tell him.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I would not be surprised if some of his retainers have deduced my identity...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But how could I possibly show my face now?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I am the one who allowed Crochi to come to power...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I was barely able to escape this room. By the time I had,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oden was already dead, and wano had changed.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: I contemplated committing seppuku there and then...
